sections.heading: What is Data Validation & Sanitization?
sections.body: Validate user input, sanitize data, and prevent injection attacks. This lesson covers the essential concepts you need to understand to get started effectively.

sections.heading: Key Concepts
sections.body:
Data Validation & Sanitization is a fundamental concept that every developer needs to master. Here are the core ideas:

1. Core Principle: The main idea behind Data Validation & Sanitization is understanding how different components work together.

2. Application: In practice, you'll use Data Validation & Sanitization every day when building applications. It's one of those skills that becomes second nature.

3. Common Patterns: Most Data Validation & Sanitization implementations follow predictable patterns. Once you recognize them, you can apply them quickly.

sections.heading: Why This Matters
sections.body: Understanding Data Validation & Sanitization is crucial because it builds the foundation for everything that follows. Master this topic and you'll find subsequent concepts much easier to learn.

summary: Data Validation & Sanitization is a core concept in best-practices. Validate user input, sanitize data, and prevent injection attacks. Focus on understanding the fundamentals first, then practice applying them.
